name: Dylan
description:
The Last Reality - School Au

Dylan is a withdrawn and unsociable high school student who is unlucky enough to have a new student join his class.

This is a normal school au that has nothing to do with canon and does not affect it.

In this au, Jenna is Dylan's twin sister and Simon Solus is their father.

Yes, I know it's a cliche, but what are you going to do to me?

Author of the art on the avatar: https://t.me/AgueraAsu
creator: Ellen_51
